TRACEABLE QURAN · EDIT
JUZ 21✦ JUZ OPENING ✦PAGE 1
PARA · JUZ
· · ·
21
الجزء ٢١
· · ·
This is Juz 21 (Para 21) of the Holy Qur'an. Trace each word, read its transliteration and meaning, and reflect as you write.
Juz OpeningPage 1 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-'ANKABUT ✦PAGE 2
٤٦
And do not argue with the People of the Scripture except in a way that is best, except for those who commit injustice among them, and say, "We believe in that which has been revealed to us and revealed to you. And our God and your God is one; and we are Muslims to Him."
٤٧
And thus We have sent down to you the Book . And those to whom We gave the Scripture believe in it. And among these are those who believe in it. And none reject Our verses except the disbelievers
walā
۞ وَلَا
And not
tujādilū
تُجَـٰدِلُوٓا۟
argue
ahla
أَهْلَ
People of the Book
l-kitābi
ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ
People of the Book
illā
إِلَّا
except
bi-allatī
بِٱلَّتِى
by which
hiya
هِىَ
aḥsanu
أَحْسَنُ
best
illā
إِلَّا
except
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
ẓalamū
ظَلَمُوا۟
wrong
min'hum
مِنْهُمْ ۖ
among them
waqūlū
وَقُولُوٓا۟
and say
āmannā
ءَامَنَّا
We believe
bi-alladhī
بِٱلَّذِىٓ
in that
unzila
أُنزِلَ
has been revealed
ilaynā
إِلَيْنَا
to us
wa-unzila
وَأُنزِلَ
and was revealed
ilaykum
إِلَيْكُمْ
to you
wa-ilāhunā
وَإِلَـٰهُنَا
And our God
wa-ilāhukum
وَإِلَـٰهُكُمْ
and your God
wāḥidun
وَٰحِدٌۭ
One
wanaḥnu
وَنَحْنُ
and we
lahu
لَهُۥ
to Him
mus'limūna
مُسْلِمُونَ
submit
 
۝٤٦
 
wakadhālika
وَكَذَٰلِكَ
And thus
anzalnā
أَنزَلْنَآ
We revealed
ilayka
إِلَيْكَ
to you

ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ۚ
the Book
fa-alladhīna
فَٱلَّذِينَ
So those

ءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمُ
We gave

ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ
the Book
yu'minūna
يُؤْمِنُونَ
believe

بِهِۦ ۖ
therein
wamin
وَمِنْ
And among
hāulāi
هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ
these
man
مَن
who
yu'minu
يُؤْمِنُ
believe
bihi
بِهِۦ ۚ
therein
wamā
وَمَا
And none
yajḥadu
يَجْحَدُ
reject
biāyātinā
بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ
Our Verses
illā
إِلَّا
except

ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
the disbelievers
 
۝٤٧
 
wamā
وَمَا
And not
kunta
كُنتَ
you
tatlū
تَتْلُوا۟
recite
min
مِن
before it
qablihi
قَبْلِهِۦ
before it
min
مِن
any
kitābin
كِتَـٰبٍۢ
Book
walā
وَلَا
and not
takhuṭṭuhu
تَخُطُّهُۥ
you write it
biyamīnika
بِيَمِينِكَ ۖ
with your right hand
idhan
إِذًۭا
in that case
la-ir'tāba
لَّٱرْتَابَ
surely have doubted
AL-'ANKABUTPage 2 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-'ANKABUT ✦PAGE 3
٤٨
And you did not recite before it any scripture, nor did you inscribe one with your right hand. Then the falsifiers would have had doubt
٤٩
Rather, it is distinct verses within the breasts of those who have been given knowledge. And none reject Our verses except the wrongdoers
٥٠
But they say, "Why are not signs sent down to him from his Lord?" Say, "The signs are only with Allāh, and I am only a clear warner."
٥١
And is it not sufficient for them that We revealed to you the Book which is recited to them? Indeed in that is a mercy and reminder for a people who believe
l-mub'ṭilūna
ٱلْمُبْطِلُونَ
the falsifiers
 
۝٤٨
 
bal
بَلْ
Nay
huwa
هُوَ
it
āyātun
ءَايَـٰتٌۢ
Verses
bayyinātun
بَيِّنَـٰتٌۭ
clear
fī
فِى
in
ṣudūri
صُدُورِ
breasts
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
ūtū
أُوتُوا۟
are given
l-ʿil'ma
ٱلْعِلْمَ ۚ
the knowledge
wamā
وَمَا
And not

يَجْحَدُ
reject
biāyātinā
بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ
Our Verses

إِلَّا
except

waqālū
وَقَالُوا۟
And they say
lawlā
لَوْلَآ

أُنزِلَ
are sent down

to him

from

قُلْ
Say
innamā
إِنَّمَا
Only

ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتُ
the Signs
ʿinda
عِندَ
with

ٱللَّهِ
Allah

I

a warner

awalam
أَوَلَمْ

يَكْفِهِمْ
sufficient for them

that We

أَنزَلْنَا
revealed

to you

the Book

يُتْلَىٰ
is recited

Indeed

فِى
in
dhālika
ذَٰلِكَ
that

لَرَحْمَةًۭ
surely is a mercy

وَذِكْرَىٰ

۝٥١
ع1
 
qul
قُلْ
Say
kafā
كَفَىٰ
Sufficient is
bil-lahi
بِٱللَّهِ
Allah
baynī
بَيْنِى
between me
wabaynakum
وَبَيْنَكُمْ
and between you
shahīdan
شَهِيدًۭا ۖ
a Witness
yaʿlamu
يَعْلَمُ
He knows
mā
مَا
what
fī
فِى
in

ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ
the heavens
wal-arḍi
وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ
and the earth
wa-alladhīna
وَٱلَّذِينَ
And those who
āmanū
ءَامَنُوا۟
believe
bil-bāṭili
بِٱلْبَـٰطِلِ
in falsehood
wakafarū
وَكَفَرُوا۟
and disbelieve
bil-lahi
بِٱللَّهِ
in Allah
AL-'ANKABUTPage 3 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-'ANKABUT ✦PAGE 4
٥٢
Say, "Sufficient is Allāh between me and you as Witness. He knows what is in the heavens and earth. And they who have believed in falsehood and disbelieved in Allāh - it is those who are the losers."
٥٣
And they urge you to hasten the punishment. And if not for a specified term, punishment would have reached them. But it will surely come to them suddenly while they perceive not
٥٤
They urge you to hasten the punishment. And indeed, Hell will be encompassing of the disbelievers
٥٥
On the Day the punishment will cover them from above them and from below their feet and it is said, "Taste what you used to do."
ulāika
أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ
those
humu
هُمُ
they
l-khāsirūna
ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
the losers
 
۝٥٢
 
wayastaʿjilūnaka
وَيَسْتَعْجِلُونَكَ
And they ask you to hasten
bil-ʿadhābi
بِٱلْعَذَابِ ۚ
the punishment
walawlā
وَلَوْلَآ
And if not
ajalun
أَجَلٌۭ
a term
musamman
مُّسَمًّۭى
appointed
lajāahumu
لَّجَآءَهُمُ
surely have come to them
l-ʿadhābu
ٱلْعَذَابُ
the punishment
walayatiyannahum
وَلَيَأْتِيَنَّهُم
But it will surely come to them
baghtatan
بَغْتَةًۭ
suddenly
wahum
وَهُمْ
while they
lā
لَا
not
yashʿurūna
يَشْعُرُونَ
perceive
 
۝٥٣
 
yastaʿjilūnaka
يَسْتَعْجِلُونَكَ
They ask you to hasten
bil-ʿadhābi
بِٱلْعَذَابِ
the punishment
wa-inna
وَإِنَّ
And indeed
jahannama
جَهَنَّمَ
Hell
lamuḥīṭatun
لَمُحِيطَةٌۢ
will surely, encompass
bil-kāfirīna
بِٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
the disbelievers
 
۝٥٤
 
yawma
يَوْمَ
On Day
yaghshāhumu
يَغْشَىٰهُمُ
will cover them
l-ʿadhābu
ٱلْعَذَابُ
the punishment
min
مِن
from
fawqihim
فَوْقِهِمْ
above them
wamin
وَمِن
and from
taḥti
تَحْتِ
below
arjulihim
أَرْجُلِهِمْ
their feet
wayaqūlu
وَيَقُولُ
and He will say
dhūqū
ذُوقُوا۟
Taste
mā
مَا
what
kuntum
كُنتُمْ
you used
taʿmalūna
تَعْمَلُونَ
do
 
۝٥٥
 
yāʿibādiya
يَـٰعِبَادِىَ
O My servants
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
who
āmanū
ءَامَنُوٓا۟
believe
inna
إِنَّ
Indeed
arḍī
أَرْضِى
My earth
wāsiʿatun
وَٰسِعَةٌۭ
spacious
fa-iyyāya
فَإِيَّـٰىَ
so only
fa-uʿ'budūni
فَٱعْبُدُونِ
worship Me
 
۝٥٦
 
kullu
كُلُّ
Every
nafsin
نَفْسٍۢ
soul
dhāiqatu
ذَآئِقَةُ
taste
l-mawti
ٱلْمَوْتِ ۖ
the death
thumma
ثُمَّ
Then
ilaynā
إِلَيْنَا
to Us
tur'jaʿūna
تُرْجَعُونَ
you will be returned
 
۝٥٧
 
AL-'ANKABUTPage 4 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-'ANKABUT ✦PAGE 5
٥٦
O My servants who have believed, indeed My earth is spacious, so worship only Me
٥٧
Every soul will taste death. Then to Us will you be returned
٥٨
And those who have believed and done righteous deeds - We will surely assign to them of Paradise chambers beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Excellent is the reward of the workers
٥٩
Who have been patient and upon their Lord rely
٦٠
And how many a creature carries not its provision. Allāh provides for it and for you. And He is the Hearing, the Knowing
٦١
If you asked them, "Who created the
wa-alladhīna
وَٱلَّذِينَ
And those who
āmanū
ءَامَنُوا۟
believe
waʿamilū
وَعَمِلُوا۟
and do
l-ṣāliḥāti
ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ
righteous deeds
lanubawwi-annahum
لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُم
surely We will give them a place
mina
مِّنَ
in
l-janati
ٱلْجَنَّةِ
Paradise
ghurafan
غُرَفًۭا
lofty dwellings
tajrī
تَجْرِى
flow
min
مِن
from
taḥtihā
تَحْتِهَا
underneath it
l-anhāru
ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ
the rivers
khālidīna
خَـٰلِدِينَ
will abide forever
fīhā
فِيهَا ۚ
in it
niʿ'ma
نِعْمَ
Excellent is
ajru
أَجْرُ
reward
l-ʿāmilīna
ٱلْعَـٰمِلِينَ
the workers
 
۝٥٨
 
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
Those who
ṣabarū
صَبَرُوا۟
patient
waʿalā
وَعَلَىٰ
and upon
rabbihim
رَبِّهِمْ
their Lord
yatawakkalūna
يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
put their trust
 
۝٥٩
 
waka-ayyin
وَكَأَيِّن
And how many
min
مِّن
of
dābbatin
دَآبَّةٍۢ
a creature
lā
لَّا
not

تَحْمِلُ
carry
riz'qahā
رِزْقَهَا
its provision

ٱللَّهُ
Allah
yarzuquhā
يَرْزُقُهَا
provides it
wa-iyyākum
وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۚ
and you
wahuwa
وَهُوَ
And He
l-samīʿu
ٱلسَّمِيعُ
the All-Hearer
l-ʿalīmu
ٱلْعَلِيمُ
the All-Knower
 
۝٦٠
 
wala-in
وَلَئِن
And if
sa-altahum
سَأَلْتَهُم
you ask them
man
مَّنْ
Who
khalaqa
خَلَقَ
created
l-samāwāti
ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ
the heavens
wal-arḍa
وَٱلْأَرْضَ
and the earth
wasakhara
وَسَخَّرَ
and subjected
l-shamsa
ٱلشَّمْسَ
the sun
wal-qamara
وَٱلْقَمَرَ
and the moon
layaqūlunna
لَيَقُولُنَّ
Surely they would say
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ ۖ
Allah
fa-annā
فَأَنَّىٰ
Then how
yu'fakūna
يُؤْفَكُونَ
are they deluded
 
۝٦١
 
al-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
Allah
yabsuṭu
يَبْسُطُ
extends
l-riz'qa
ٱلرِّزْقَ
the provision
liman
لِمَن
for whom
AL-'ANKABUTPage 5 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-'ANKABUT ✦PAGE 6
…
heavens and earth and subjected the sun and the moon?" they would surely say, "Allāh." Then how are they deluded?
٦٢
Allāh extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts for him. Indeed Allāh is, of all things, Knowing
٦٣
And if you asked them, "Who sends down rain from the sky and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness?" they would surely say, "Allāh." Say, "Praise to Allāh"; but most of them do not reason
٦٤
And this worldly life is not but diversion and amusement. And indeed, the home of the Hereafter - that is the life, if only they knew
yashāu
يَشَآءُ
He wills
min
مِنْ
of
ʿibādihi
عِبَادِهِۦ
His slaves
wayaqdiru
وَيَقْدِرُ
and restricts
lahu
لَهُۥٓ ۚ
for him
inna
إِنَّ
Indeed
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
bikulli
بِكُلِّ
of every
shayin
شَىْءٍ
thing
ʿalīmun
عَلِيمٌۭ
All-Knower
 
۝٦٢
 
wala-in
وَلَئِن
And if
sa-altahum
سَأَلْتَهُم
you ask them
man
مَّن
Who
nazzala
نَّزَّلَ
sends down
mina
مِنَ
from
l-samāi
ٱلسَّمَآءِ
the sky
māan
مَآءًۭ
water
fa-aḥyā
فَأَحْيَا
and gives life
bihi
بِهِ
thereby
l-arḍa
ٱلْأَرْضَ
the earth
min
مِنۢ
after
baʿdi
بَعْدِ
after
mawtihā
مَوْتِهَا
its death
layaqūlunna
لَيَقُولُنَّ
Surely, they would say
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ ۚ
Allah
quli
قُلِ
Say
l-ḥamdu
ٱلْحَمْدُ
All Praises
lillahi
لِلَّهِ ۚ
for Allah
bal
بَلْ
But
aktharuhum
أَكْثَرُهُمْ
most of them
lā

not

يَعْقِلُونَ
use reason
Ruku 2
۝٦٣
ع2
 
wamā
وَمَا
And not
hādhihi
هَـٰذِهِ
this
l-ḥayatu
ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ
life
l-dun'yā
ٱلدُّنْيَآ
the world
illā
إِلَّا
but
lahwun
لَهْوٌۭ
amusement
walaʿibun
وَلَعِبٌۭ ۚ
and play
wa-inna
وَإِنَّ
And indeed
l-dāra
ٱلدَّارَ
the Home
l-ākhirata
ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
the Hereafter
lahiya
لَهِىَ
surely, it
l-ḥayawānu
ٱلْحَيَوَانُ ۚ
the life
law
لَوْ
if only
kānū
كَانُوا۟
they
yaʿlamūna
يَعْلَمُونَ
know
 
۝٦٤
 
fa-idhā
فَإِذَا
And when
rakibū
رَكِبُوا۟
they embark
fī
فِى
l-ful'ki
ٱلْفُلْكِ
the ship
daʿawū
دَعَوُا۟
they call
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
mukh'liṣīna
مُخْلِصِينَ
sincere
lahu
لَهُ
to Him
l-dīna
ٱلدِّينَ
the religion
falammā
فَلَمَّا
But when
najjāhum
نَجَّىٰهُمْ
He delivers them
ilā
إِلَى
to
AL-'ANKABUTPage 6 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-'ANKABUT ✦PAGE 7
٦٥
And when they board a ship, they supplicate Allāh, sincere to Him in religion . But when He delivers them to the land, at once they associate others with Him
٦٦
So that they will deny what We have granted them, and they will enjoy themselves. But they are going to know
٦٧
Have they not seen that We made a safe sanctuary, while people are being taken away all around them? Then in falsehood do they believe, and in the favor of Allāh they disbelieve?
٦٨
And who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about Allāh or denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a residence for the disbelievers?
l-bari
ٱلْبَرِّ
the land
idhā
إِذَا
behold
hum
هُمْ
they
yush'rikūna
يُشْرِكُونَ
associate partners

AL-'ANKABUTPage 7 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 8
✦ ✦ ✦
الروم
Ar-Rum
Surah 30 · The Romans · Makkah · 60 Verses
· · ·
بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
✦ ✦ ✦
Ar-Rum OpeningPage 8 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 9
٦٩
And those who strive for Us - We will surely guide them to Our ways. And indeed, Allāh is with the doers of good
١
Alif, Lām, Meem
٢
The Byzantines have been defeated
٣
In the nearest land. But they, after their defeat, will overcome
٤
Within three to nine years. To Allāh belongs the command before and after. And that day the believers will rejoice
٥
In the victory of Allāh. He gives victory to whom He wills, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
٦
the promise of Allāh. Allāh does not fail in His promise, but most of the people do
alif-lam-meem
الٓمٓ
Alif Lam Meem
 
۝١
 
ghulibati
غُلِبَتِ
Have been defeated
l-rūmu
ٱلرُّومُ
the Romans

۝٧
 
awalam
أَوَلَمْ
Do not
yatafakkarū
يَتَفَكَّرُوا۟
they ponder
fī
فِىٓ
within
AR-RUMPage 9 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 10
…
not know
٧
They know what is apparent of the worldly life, but they, of the Hereafter, are unaware
٨
Do they not contemplate within themselves? Allāh has not created the heavens and the earth and what is between them except in truth and for a specified term. And indeed, many of the people, in the meeting with their Lord, are disbelievers
٩
Have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? They were greater than them in power, and they plowed the earth and built it up more than they have built it up, and their messengers came to them with clear evidences. And
anfusihim
أَنفُسِهِم ۗ
themselves
mā
مَّا
Not
khalaqa
خَلَقَ
Allah created

۝٩
 
thumma
ثُمَّ
Then
kāna
كَانَ
was
ʿāqibata
عَـٰقِبَةَ
end
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
AR-RUMPage 10 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 11
…
Allāh would not ever have wronged them, but they were wronging themselves
١٠
Then the end of those who did evil was the worst because they denied the signs of Allāh and used to ridicule them
١١
Allāh begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned
١٢
And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will be in despair
١٣
And there will not be for them among their partners any intercessors, and they will be disbelievers in their partners
١٤
And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated
١٥
And as for those who had believed
asāū
أَسَـٰٓـُٔوا۟
did evil

ٱلسُّوٓأَىٰٓ
the evil

۝١٥
 
wa-ammā
وَأَمَّا
But as for
AR-RUMPage 11 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 12
…
and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden , delighted
١٦
But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment
١٧
So exalted is Allāh when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning
١٨
And to Him is praise throughout the heavens and the earth. And at night and when you are at noon
١٩
He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out
٢٠
And of His signs is
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
kafarū
كَفَرُوا۟
disbelieved

wamin

۝٢٠
 
wamin
وَمِنْ
And among
āyātihi
ءَايَـٰتِهِۦٓ
His Signs
an
أَنْ
that
khalaqa
خَلَقَ
He created
lakum
لَكُم
for you
AR-RUMPage 12 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 13
…
that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing
٢١
And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought
٢٢
And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge
٢٣
And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen
min
مِّنْ
from
anfusikum
أَنفُسِكُمْ
yourselves
azwājan
أَزْوَٰجًۭا
mates

لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟
that you may find tranquility
ilayhā

in them
wajaʿala
وَجَعَلَ
and He placed
baynakum
بَيْنَكُم
between you
mawaddatan
مَّوَدَّةًۭ

وَرَحْمَةً ۚ

ٱلْبَرْقَ

خَوْفًۭا

mina
مِنَ
from
AR-RUMPage 13 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 14
٢٤
And of His signs is He shows you the lightning fear and aspiration, and He sends down rain from the sky by which He brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that are signs for a people who use reason
٢٥
And of His signs is that the heaven and earth stand by His command. Then when He calls you with a call from the earth, immediately you will come forth
٢٦
And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient
٢٧
And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest description in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might,
l-samāi
ٱلسَّمَآءِ
the sky
māan
مَآءًۭ
water
fayuḥ'yī
فَيُحْىِۦ

AR-RUMPage 14 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 15
…
the Wise
٢٨
He presents to you an example from yourselves. Do you have among those whom your right hands possess any partners in what We have provided for you so that you are equal therein would fear them as your fear of one another ? Thus do We detail the verses for a people who use reason
٢٩
But those who wrong follow their desires without knowledge. Then who can guide one whom Allāh has sent astray? And for them there are no helpers

That
l-dīnu
ٱلدِّينُ
the religion
AR-RUMPage 15 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 16
٣٠
So direct your face toward the religion, inclining to truth. the fiṭrah of Allāh upon which He has created people. No change should there be in the creation of Allāh. That is the correct religion, but most of the people do not know
٣١
turning in repentance to Him, and fear Him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with Allāh
٣٢
of those who have divided their religion and become sects, every faction rejoicing in what it has
٣٣
And when adversity touches the people, they call upon their Lord, turning in repentance to Him. Then when He lets them taste mercy from Him, at once a party of
l-qayimu
ٱلْقَيِّمُ
the correct
walākinna
وَلَـٰكِنَّ
but

not

۝٣٥
 
AR-RUMPage 16 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 17
…
them associate others with their Lord
٣٤
So that they will deny what We have granted them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know
٣٥
Or have We sent down to them an authority , and it speaks of what they have been associating with Him?
٣٦
And when We let the people taste mercy, they rejoice therein, but if evil afflicts them for what their hands have put forth, immediately they despair
٣٧
Do they not see that Allāh extends provision for whom He wills and restricts ? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe
٣٨
So give the

wamā
وَمَآ
But what
AR-RUMPage 17 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 18
…
relative his right, as well as the needy and the traveler. That is best for those who desire the face of Allāh, and it is they who will be the successful
٣٩
And whatever you give for interest to increase within the wealth of people will not increase with Allāh. But what you give in zakāh, desiring the face of Allāh - those are the multipliers
٤٠
Allāh is the one who created you, then provided for you, then will cause you to die, and then will give you life. Are there any of your "partners" who does anything of that? Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him
٤١
Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea by
ātaytum
ءَاتَيْتُم
you give
min
مِّن
of
zakatin
زَكَوٰةٍۢ

those who

before

كَانَ
Most of them were
AR-RUMPage 18 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 19
…
what the hands of people have earned so He may let them taste part of what they have done that perhaps they will return
٤٢
Say, , "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of those before. Most of them were associators
٤٣
So direct your face toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided
٤٤
Whoever disbelieves - upon him is his disbelief. And whoever does righteousness - they are for themselves preparing
٤٥
That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out
aktharuhum
أَكْثَرُهُم
Most of them were
mush'rikīna
مُّشْرِكِينَ
polytheists

fa-aqim
فَأَقِمْ

وَجْهَكَ
your face

to the religion

right

walaqad
وَلَقَدْ

arsalnā
أَرْسَلْنَا
We sent

مِن
before you
qablika
قَبْلِكَ
before you
AR-RUMPage 19 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 20
…
of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers
٤٦
And of His signs is that He sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste His mercy and so the ships may sail at His command and so you may seek of His bounty, and perhaps you will be grateful
٤٧
And We have already sent messengers before you to their peoples, and they came to them with clear evidences; then We took retribution from those who committed crimes, and incumbent upon Us was support of the believers
٤٨
It is Allāh who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds and spread them in the sky however He wills, and He makes them fragments so you
rusulan
رُسُلًا
Messengers
ilā
إِلَىٰ
to
qawmihim

at

ءَاثَـٰرِ
effects
raḥmati
رَحْمَتِ
Mercy
AR-RUMPage 20 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 21
…
see the rain emerge from within them. And when He causes it to fall upon whom He wills of His servants, immediately they rejoice
٤٩
Although they were, before it was sent down upon them - before that, in despair
٥٠
So observe the effects of the mercy of Allāh - how He gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed, that will give life to the dead, and He is over all things competent
٥١
But if We should send a wind and they saw turned yellow, they would remain thereafter disbelievers
٥٢
So indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they

Allah

AR-RUMPage 21 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 22
…
turn their backs, retreating
٥٣
And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims
٥٤
Allāh is the one who created you from weakness, then made after weakness strength, then made after strength weakness and white hair. He creates what He wills, and He is the Knowing, the Competent
٥٥
And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will swear they had remained but an hour. Thus they were deluded
٥٦
But those who were given knowledge and faith will say, "You remained the extent of Allāh's decree until the Day of
thumma
ثُمَّ
then

جَعَلَ
made

۝٥٧
 
walaqad
وَلَقَدْ
And verily
ḍarabnā
ضَرَبْنَا
We set forth
AR-RUMPage 22 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AR-RUM ✦PAGE 23
…
Resurrection, and this is the Day of Resurrection, but you did not used to know."
٥٧
So that Day, their excuse will not benefit those who wronged, nor will they be asked to appease
٥٨
And We have certainly presented to the people in this Qur’ān from every example. But, , if you should bring them a sign, the disbelievers will surely say, "You are but falsifiers."
٥٩
Thus does Allāh seal the hearts of those who do not know
٦٠
So be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And let them not disquiet you who are not certain

for mankind

in

AR-RUMPage 23 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 24
✦ ✦ ✦
لقمان
Luqman
Surah 31 · Luqman · Makkah · 34 Verses
· · ·
بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
✦ ✦ ✦
Luqman OpeningPage 24 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 25
١
Alif, Lām, Meem
٢
These are verses of the wise Book
٣
As guidance and mercy for the doers of good
٤
Who establish prayer and give zakāh, and they, of the Hereafter, are certain
٥
Those are on guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful
٦
And of the people is he who buys the amusement of speech to mislead from the way of Allāh without knowledge and who takes it in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment
alif-lam-meem
الٓمٓ
Alif Lam Meem
 
۝١
 
til'ka
تِلْكَ
These
āyātu
ءَايَـٰتُ
Verses
l-kitābi
ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ
the Book
l-ḥakīmi
ٱلْحَكِيمِ
the Wise
 
۝٢
 
hudan
هُدًۭى
A guidance
waraḥmatan
وَرَحْمَةًۭ
and a mercy
lil'muḥ'sinīna
لِّلْمُحْسِنِينَ
for the good-doers
 
۝٣
 
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
Those who
yuqīmūna
يُقِيمُونَ
establish
l-ṣalata
ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ

وَيُؤْتُونَ
and give

وَإِذَا

تُتْلَىٰ
are recited

to him

Our Verses

وَلَّىٰ
he turns away
LUQMANPage 25 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 26
٧
And when Our verses are recited to him, he turns away arrogantly as if he had not heard them, as if there was in his ears deafness. So give him tidings of a painful punishment
٨
Indeed, those who believe and do righteous deeds - for them are the Gardens of Pleasure
٩
Wherein they abide eternally; the promise of Allāh truth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise
١٠
He created the heavens without pillars that you see and has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with you, and dispersed therein from every creature. And We sent down rain from the sky and made grow therein of every noble kind
mus'takbiran
مُسْتَكْبِرًۭا
arrogantly
ka-an
كَأَن
as if
lam
لَّمْ
not

يَسْمَعْهَا
he heard them

كَأَنَّ
as if

of a punishment

This

creation
l-lahi
ٱللَّهِ
Allah
fa-arūnī
فَأَرُونِى
So show Me
LUQMANPage 26 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 27
١١
This is the creation of Allāh. So show Me what those other than Him have created. Rather, the wrongdoers are in clear error
١٢
And We had certainly given Luqmān wisdom , "Be grateful to Allāh." And whoever is grateful is grateful for himself. And whoever denies - then indeed, Allāh is Free of need and Praiseworthy
١٣
And , when Luqmān said to his son while he was instructing him, "O my son, do not associate with Allāh. Indeed, association is great injustice."

مَاذَا
what
khalaqa
خَلَقَ
have created

in

أَنِ
that
ush'kur
ٱشْكُرْ
Be grateful
lī
لِى
to Me
waliwālidayka
وَلِوَٰلِدَيْكَ
and to your parents
ilayya
إِلَىَّ
towards Me
LUQMANPage 27 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 28
١٤
And We have enjoined upon man for his parents. His mother carried him, in weakness upon weakness, and his weaning is in two years. Be grateful to Me and to your parents; to Me is the destination
١٥
But if they endeavor to make you associate with Me that of which you have no knowledge, do not obey them but accompany them in world with appropriate kindness and follow the way of those who turn back to Me . Then to Me will be your return, and I will inform you about what you used to do
١٦
"O my son, indeed if it should be the weight of a mustard seed and should be within a rock or in the heavens or in the earth, Allāh
l-maṣīru
ٱلْمَصِيرُ
the destination

yābunayya
يَـٰبُنَىَّ
O my son
aqimi
أَقِمِ
Establish
l-ṣalata
ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ
the prayer

and enjoin

from
LUQMANPage 28 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 29
…
will bring it forth. Indeed, Allāh is Subtle and Aware
١٧
O my son, establish prayer, enjoin what is right, forbid what is wrong, and be patient over what befalls you. Indeed, that is of the matters resolve
١٨
And do not turn your cheek toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly. Indeed, Allāh does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful
١٩
And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice; indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys."
l-munkari
ٱلْمُنكَرِ
the wrong

and hidden

But of

ٱلنَّاسِ
the people

مَن
who
yujādilu
يُجَـٰدِلُ
disputes
fī
فِى
about
l-lahi
ٱللَّهِ
Allah
LUQMANPage 29 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 30
٢٠
Do you not see that Allāh has made subject to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and amply bestowed upon you His favors, apparent and unapparent? But of the people is he who disputes about Allāh without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening Book
٢١
And when it is said to them, "Follow what Allāh has revealed," they say, "Rather, we will follow that upon which we found our fathers." Even if Satan was inviting them to the punishment of the Blaze?
٢٢
And whoever submits his face to Allāh while he is a doer of good - then he has grasped the most trustworthy handhold. And to Allāh will be the
bighayri
بِغَيْرِ
without
ʿil'min
عِلْمٍۢ
knowledge
walā
وَلَا
and not
hudan
هُدًۭى
guidance
walā
وَلَا
and not
kitābin
كِتَـٰبٍۢ
a book
munīrin
مُّنِيرٍۢ
enlightening

And whoever

كَفَرَ
disbelieves
falā
فَلَا
let not
yaḥzunka
يَحْزُنكَ
grieve you

كُفْرُهُۥٓ ۚ
his disbelief

To Us

عَمِلُوٓا۟ ۚ
they did
inna
إِنَّ
Indeed
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
ʿalīmun
عَلِيمٌۢ
the All-Knower
bidhāti
بِذَاتِ
of what
LUQMANPage 30 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 31
…
outcome of matters
٢٣
And whoever has disbelieved - let not his disbelief grieve you. To Us is their return, and We will inform them of what they did. Indeed, Allāh is Knowing of that within the breasts
٢٤
We grant them enjoyment for a little; then We will force them to a massive punishment
٢٥
And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and earth?" they would surely say, "Allāh." Say, " praise is to Allāh"; but most of them do not know
٢٦
To Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and earth. Indeed, Allāh is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy
٢٧
And if whatever trees upon the
l-ṣudūri
ٱلصُّدُورِ
the breasts
 
۝٢٣
 
numattiʿuhum
نُمَتِّعُهُمْ

a little

then

to

a punishment

All-Mighty

All-Wise

mā

Not

your creation
walā
وَلَا
and not
LUQMANPage 31 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 32
…
earth were pens and the sea , replenished thereafter by seven seas, the words of Allāh would not be exhausted. Indeed, Allāh is Exalted in Might and Wise
٢٨
Your creation and your resurrection will not be but as that of a single soul. Indeed, Allāh is Hearing and Seeing
٢٩
Do you not see that Allāh causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running for a specified term, and that Allāh, of whatever you do, is Aware?
٣٠
That is because Allāh is the True Reality, and that what they call upon other than Him is falsehood, and because Allāh is the Most High, the
baʿthukum
بَعْثُكُمْ
your resurrection
illā
إِلَّا
but
kanafsin
كَنَفْسٍۢ
as a soul

through

by Grace

LUQMANPage 32 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 33
…
Grand
٣١
Do you not see that ships sail through the sea by the favor of Allāh that He may show you of His signs? Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful
٣٢
And when waves come over them like canopies, they supplicate Allāh, sincere to Him in religion . But when He delivers them to the land, there are of them who are moderate . And none rejects Our signs except everyone treacherous and ungrateful
āyātihi
ءَايَـٰتِهِۦٓ ۚ
His Signs
inna
إِنَّ
Indeed
fī
فِى
in

that

لَـَٔايَـٰتٍۢ

لِّكُلِّ
for everyone
ṣabbārin
صَبَّارٍۢ
patient
shakūrin
شَكُورٍۢ
grateful

wa-idhā
وَإِذَا

غَشِيَهُم

شَيْـًٔا ۚ

Promise

ٱللَّهِ
Allah

حَقٌّۭ ۖ
True

فَلَا
so let not deceive you
taghurrannakumu
تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ
so let not deceive you
l-ḥayatu
ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ
the life
l-dun'yā
ٱلدُّنْيَا
the world
walā
وَلَا
and let not deceive you
yaghurrannakum
يَغُرَّنَّكُم
and let not deceive you
bil-lahi
بِٱللَّهِ
about Allah
LUQMANPage 33 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ LUQMAN ✦PAGE 34
٣٣
O mankind, fear your Lord and fear a Day when no father will avail his son, nor will a son avail his father at all. Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allāh by the Deceiver
٣٤
Indeed, Allāh has knowledge of the Hour and sends down the rain and knows what is in the wombs. And no soul perceives what it will earn tomorrow, and no soul perceives in what land it will die. Indeed, Allāh is Knowing and Aware
l-gharūru
ٱلْغَرُورُ
the deceiver
 
۝٣٣
 
inna
إِنَّ
Indeed
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
ʿindahu
عِندَهُۥ
with Him
ʿil'mu
عِلْمُ
knowledge

ٱلسَّاعَةِ
the Hour

and knows

❋

LUQMANPage 34 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 35
✦ ✦ ✦
السجدة
As-Sajdah
Surah 32 · The Prostration · Makkah · 30 Verses
· · ·
بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
✦ ✦ ✦
As-Sajdah OpeningPage 35 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 36
١
Alif, Lām, Meem
٢
the revelation of the Book about which there is no doubt from the Lord of the worlds
٣
Or do they say, "He invented it"? Rather, it is the truth from your Lord, , that you may warn a people to whom no warner has come before you perhaps they will be guided
٤
It is Allāh who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days; then He established Himself above the Throne. You have not besides Him any protector or any intercessor; so will you not be reminded?
alif-lam-meem
الٓمٓ
Alif Lam Meem
 
۝١
 
tanzīlu
تَنزِيلُ
revelation

ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ
the Book

لَا
no
rayba
رَيْبَ
doubt

فِيهِ
about it

مِن
from
rabbi
رَّبِّ
Lord

the worlds

am
أَمْ

قَوْمًۭا

has come to them

مِّن
any

نَّذِيرٍۢ

قَبْلِكَ

لَعَلَّهُمْ

۝٤
 
yudabbiru
يُدَبِّرُ
He regulates

ٱلْأَمْرَ
the affair
mina
مِنَ
of
l-samāi
ٱلسَّمَآءِ
the heaven
ilā
إِلَى
to

ٱلْأَرْضِ

thumma
ثُمَّ
then
yaʿruju
يَعْرُجُ
it will ascend
ilayhi
إِلَيْهِ
to Him
AS-SAJDAHPage 36 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 37
٥
He arranges matter from the heaven to the earth; then it will ascend to Him in a Day, the extent of which is a thousand years of those which you count
٦
That is the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
٧
Who perfected everything which He created and began the creation of man from clay
٨
Then He made his posterity out of the extract of a liquid disdained
٩
Then He proportioned him and breathed into him from His soul and made for you hearing and vision and hearts ; little are you grateful
fī
فِى
in
yawmin
يَوْمٍۢ
a Day
kāna
كَانَ
measure of which is
miq'dāruhu
مِقْدَارُهُۥٓ
measure of which is
alfa
أَلْفَ
a thousand
sanatin
سَنَةٍۢ
years
mimmā
مِّمَّا
of what
taʿuddūna
تَعُدُّونَ
you count
 
۝٥
 
dhālika
ذَٰلِكَ
That
ʿālimu
عَـٰلِمُ
Knower
l-ghaybi
ٱلْغَيْبِ
the hidden
wal-shahādati
وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ
and the witnessed
l-ʿazīzu
ٱلْعَزِيزُ
the All-Mighty
l-raḥīmu
ٱلرَّحِيمُ
the Most Merciful
 
۝٦
 
alladhī
ٱلَّذِىٓ
The One Who
aḥsana
أَحْسَنَ
made good

كُلَّ
every
shayin
شَىْءٍ
thing

خَلَقَهُۥ ۖ
He created
wabada-a
وَبَدَأَ
and He began
khalqa
خَلْقَ
creation
l-insāni
ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ
man

مِن
from

طِينٍۢ
clay
 
۝٧
 
thumma
ثُمَّ
Then

He made

نَسْلَهُۥ
his progeny

مِن

new

بِلِقَآءِ
in meeting
AS-SAJDAHPage 37 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 38
١٠
And they say, "When we are lost within the earth, will we indeed be in a new creation?" Rather, they are, in the meeting with their Lord, disbelievers
١١
Say, "The angel of death who has been entrusted with you will take you. Then to your Lord you will be returned."
١٢
If you could but see when the criminals are hanging their heads before their Lord, , "Our Lord, we have seen and heard, so return us ; we will work righteousness. Indeed, we are certain."
١٣
And if We had willed, We could have given every soul its guidance, but the word from Me will come into effect "I will surely fill Hell with jinn and people all together
rabbihim
رَبِّهِمْ
their Lord
kāfirūna
كَـٰفِرُونَ
disbelievers

qul
۞ قُلْ
Say

يَتَوَفَّىٰكُم

مَّلَكُ

ٱلْمَوْتِ
the death

the one who

AS-SAJDAHPage 38 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 39
١٤
So taste because you forgot the meeting of this, your Day; indeed, We have forgotten you. And taste the punishment of eternity for what you used to do."
١٥
Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant
١٦
Their sides part from beds; they supplicate their Lord in fear and aspiration, and from what We have provided them, they spend
١٧
And no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes as reward for what they used to do
١٨
Then is one who was a believer like one
bimā
بِمَا
for what
kuntum
كُنتُمْ
you used
taʿmalūna
تَعْمَلُونَ
do

أَمَّا
As for

ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
āmanū
ءَامَنُوا۟

وَعَمِلُوا۟

AS-SAJDAHPage 39 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 40
…
who was defiantly disobedient? They are not equal
١٩
As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do
٢٠
But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny."
٢١
And We will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will return
٢٢
And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the
l-ṣāliḥāti
ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ
righteous deeds
falahum
فَلَهُمْ

۝٢٢

walaqad
وَلَقَدْ
And certainly
ātaynā
ءَاتَيْنَا
We gave
AS-SAJDAHPage 40 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 41
…
verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution
٢٣
And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And We made it guidance for the Children of Israel
٢٤
And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and they were certain of Our signs
٢٥
Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ
٢٦
Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, they walk among their dwellings? Indeed
mūsā
مُوسَى
Musa

awalam
أَوَلَمْ
Do not

أَنَّا
that We

نَسُوقُ
drive
AS-SAJDAHPage 41 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AS-SAJDAH ✦PAGE 42
…
in that are signs; then do they not hear?
٢٧
Have they not seen that We drive water to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and themselves? Then do they not see?
٢٨
And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful?"
٢٩
Say, , "On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved."
٣٠
So turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting
l-māa
ٱلْمَآءَ
water
ilā
إِلَى
to

AS-SAJDAHPage 42 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 43
✦ ✦ ✦
الأحزاب
Al-Ahzab
Surah 33 · The Combined Forces · Madinah · 73 Verses
· · ·
بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
✦ ✦ ✦
Al-Ahzab OpeningPage 43 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 44
١
O Prophet, fear Allāh and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise
٢
And follow that which is revealed to you from your Lord. Indeed Allāh is ever, of what you do, Aware
٣
And rely upon Allāh; and sufficient is Allāh as Disposer of affairs
yāayyuhā
يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا
O Prophet
l-nabiyu
ٱلنَّبِىُّ
O Prophet
ittaqi
ٱتَّقِ
Fear
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
walā
وَلَا
and not
tuṭiʿi
تُطِعِ

That

قَوْلُكُم
your saying
bi-afwāhikum

by your mouths

yaqūlu

l-ḥaqa
ٱلْحَقَّ
the truth
AL-AHZABPage 44 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 45
٤
Allāh has not made for a man two hearts in his interior. And He has not made your wives whom you declare unlawful your mothers. And He has not made your claimed sons your sons. That is your saying by your mouths, but Allāh says the truth, and He guides to the way
٥
Call them by their fathers; it is more just in the sight of Allāh. But if you do not know their fathers - then they are your brothers in religion and those entrusted to you. And there is no blame upon you for that in which you have erred but what your hearts intended. And ever is Allāh Forgiving and Merciful
wahuwa
وَهُوَ
and He
yahdī
يَهْدِى
guides
l-sabīla
ٱلسَّبِيلَ
the Way
 
۝٤
 
id'ʿūhum
ٱدْعُوهُمْ
Call them
liābāihim
لِـَٔابَآئِهِمْ
by their fathers
huwa
هُوَ
it

near

in

Allah

مِنَ
than

an

that

you do

إِلَىٰٓ
to

أَوْلِيَآئِكُم
your friends
maʿrūfan

a kindness
kāna
كَانَ
That is
dhālika
ذَٰلِكَ
That is
fī
فِى
in
AL-AHZABPage 45 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 46
٦
The Prophet is more worthy of the believers than themselves, and his wives are their mothers. And those of relationship are more entitled in the decree of Allāh than the believers and the emigrants, except that you may do to your close associates a kindness . That was in the Book inscribed
٧
And , when We took from the prophets their covenant and from you and from Noah and Abraham and Moses and Jesus, the son of Mary; and We took from them a solemn covenant
٨
That He may question the truthful about their truth. And He has prepared for the disbelievers a painful punishment
٩
O you who have believed, remember
l-kitābi
ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ
the Book
masṭūran
مَسْطُورًۭا
written
 
۝٦
 
wa-idh
وَإِذْ

akhadhnā
أَخَذْنَا

from

from them

All-Seer
 
۝٩
 
idh
إِذْ
When
jāūkum
جَآءُوكُم
they came upon you
min
مِّن
from
AL-AHZABPage 46 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 47
…
the favor of Allāh upon you when armies came to you and We sent upon them a wind and armies you did not see. And ever is Allāh, of what you do, Seeing
١٠
when they came at you from above you and from below you, and when eyes shifted , and hearts reached the throats, and you assumed about Allāh assumptions
١١
There the believers were tested and shaken with a severe shaking
١٢
And when the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease said, "Allāh and His Messenger did not promise us except delusion,"
fawqikum
فَوْقِكُمْ
above you
wamin
وَمِنْ
and from
asfala

below

مِنكُمْ
you

وَإِذْ
and when

زَاغَتِ
grew wild

ٱلْأَبْصَـٰرُ
the eyes

وَبَلَغَتِ
and reached

ٱلْحَنَاجِرَ

wa-idh
وَإِذْ
And when

قَالَت
said

طَّآئِفَةٌۭ
a party

of them

يَـٰٓأَهْلَ
O People

Yathrib
lā

No

stand

for you

فَرِيقٌۭ

of them

ٱلنَّبِىَّ

يَقُولُونَ
saying
inna
إِنَّ
Indeed
buyūtanā
بُيُوتَنَا
our houses
ʿawratun
عَوْرَةٌۭ
exposed
wamā
وَمَا
and not
hiya
هِىَ
they
biʿawratin
بِعَوْرَةٍ ۖ
exposed
AL-AHZABPage 47 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 48
١٣
And when a faction of them said, "O people of Yathrib, there is no stability for you , so return ." And a party of them asked permission of the Prophet, saying, "Indeed, our houses are exposed ," while they were not exposed. They did not intend except to flee
١٤
And if they had been entered upon from all its regions and fitnah had been demanded of them, they would have done it and not hesitated over it except briefly
١٥
And they had already promised Allāh before not to turn their backs . And ever is the promise to Allāh questioned
١٦
Say, , "Never will fleeing benefit you if you should flee from death or killing; and then ,
in
إِن
Not
yurīdūna
يُرِيدُونَ
they wished
illā
إِلَّا
but
firāran
فِرَارًۭا
to flee
 
۝١٣
 
walaw
وَلَوْ
And if

min

from

أَقْطَارِهَا

ثُمَّ
then

ٱلْفِتْنَةَ
the treachery

wamā

and not

تَلَبَّثُوا۟
they have hesitated

over it

except

a little

before

and then

except

۝١٦
 
qul
قُلْ
Say
man
مَن
Who
dhā
ذَا
it that

ٱلَّذِى
it that
yaʿṣimukum
يَعْصِمُكُم
protect you
mina
مِّنَ
from

ٱللَّهِ
Allah
in
إِنْ
If
arāda
أَرَادَ
He intends
bikum
بِكُمْ
for you
sūan
سُوٓءًا
any harm
aw
أَوْ
or
arāda
أَرَادَ
He intends
AL-AHZABPage 48 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 49
…
you would not be given enjoyment except for a little."
١٧
Say, "Who is it that can protect you from Allāh if He intends for you an ill or intends for you a mercy?" And they will not find for themselves besides Allāh any protector or any helper
١٨
Already Allāh knows the hinderers among you and those who say to their brothers, "Come to us," and do not go to battle, except for a few
bikum
بِكُمْ
for you
raḥmatan
رَحْمَةًۭ ۚ
a mercy
walā
وَلَا
And not
yajidūna
يَجِدُونَ
they will find
lahum
لَهُم
for them
min
مِّن
besides
dūni

besides
l-lahi
ٱللَّهِ
Allah
waliyyan
وَلِيًّۭا
any protector
walā
وَلَا
and not
naṣīran
نَصِيرًۭا
any helper
 
۝١٧
 
qad
۞ قَدْ
Verily

يَعْلَمُ
Allah knows

ٱللَّهُ
Allah knows

۝١٨
 
ashiḥḥatan
أَشِحَّةً
Miserly

towards you

looking

إِلَيْكَ
at you

تَدُورُ
revolving

أَعْيُنُهُمْ
their eyes
ka-alladhī
كَٱلَّذِى
like one who
yugh'shā
يُغْشَىٰ
faints
ʿalayhi
عَلَيْهِ
faints
mina
مِنَ
from
l-mawti
ٱلْمَوْتِ ۖ
death
fa-idhā
فَإِذَا
But when
dhahaba
ذَهَبَ
departs
l-khawfu
ٱلْخَوْفُ
the fear
salaqūkum
سَلَقُوكُم
they smite you
bi-alsinatin
بِأَلْسِنَةٍ
with tongues
ḥidādin
حِدَادٍ
sharp
ashiḥḥatan
أَشِحَّةً
miserly
ʿalā
عَلَى
towards
l-khayri
ٱلْخَيْرِ ۚ
the good
ulāika
أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ
Those
lam
لَمْ
not
yu'minū
يُؤْمِنُوا۟
they have believed
fa-aḥbaṭa
فَأَحْبَطَ
so Allah made worthless
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
so Allah made worthless
aʿmālahum
أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ ۚ
their deeds
wakāna
وَكَانَ
And is
dhālika
ذَٰلِكَ
that
AL-AHZABPage 49 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 50
١٩
Indisposed toward you. And when fear comes, you see them looking at you, their eyes revolving like one being overcome by death. But when fear departs, they lash you with sharp tongues, indisposed toward good. Those have not believed, so Allāh has rendered their deeds worthless, and ever is that, for Allāh, easy
٢٠
They think the companies have not withdrawn. And if the companies should come , they would wish they were in the desert among the bedouins, inquiring about your news. And if they should be among you, they would not fight except for a little
٢١
There has certainly been for you in the Messenger of Allāh an excellent pattern for anyone
ʿalā
عَلَى
for
l-lahi
ٱللَّهِ
Allah
yasīran
يَسِيرًۭا
easy
 
۝١٩
 
yaḥsabūna
يَحْسَبُونَ
They think
l-aḥzāba
ٱلْأَحْزَابَ
the confederates
lam
لَمْ
not
yadhhabū
يَذْهَبُوا۟ ۖ
withdrawn
wa-in
وَإِن
And if
yati
يَأْتِ
come
l-aḥzābu
ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
the confederates
yawaddū
يَوَدُّوا۟
they would wish
law
لَوْ
if
annahum
أَنَّهُم
that they
bādūna
بَادُونَ
living in desert
fī
فِى
among

the Bedouins

يَسْـَٔلُونَ
asking

عَنْ
about

أَنۢبَآئِكُمْ ۖ
your news
walaw
وَلَوْ
And if
kānū
كَانُوا۟
they were

فِيكُم
among you
mā
مَّا
not

except

قَلِيلًۭا

۝٢٠
ع18
 
laqad
لَّقَدْ
Certainly

is

for you

in

an excellent example

an excellent example

كَانَ
has

يَرْجُوا۟

ٱللَّهَ
Allah

وَٱلْيَوْمَ
and the Day

ٱلْـَٔاخِرَ

۝٢١
 
walammā
وَلَمَّا
And when
raā
رَءَا
saw
l-mu'minūna
ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
the believers
l-aḥzāba
ٱلْأَحْزَابَ
the confederates
qālū
قَالُوا۟
they said
hādhā
هَـٰذَا
This
mā
مَا
what
waʿadanā
وَعَدَنَا
Allah promised us
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
Allah promised us
warasūluhu
وَرَسُولُهُۥ
and His Messenger
waṣadaqa
وَصَدَقَ
and Allah spoke the truth
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
and Allah spoke the truth
AL-AHZABPage 50 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 51
…
whose hope is in Allāh and the Last Day and remembers Allāh often
٢٢
And when the believers saw the companies, they said, "This is what Allāh and His Messenger had promised us, and Allāh and His Messenger spoke the truth." And it increased them only in faith and acceptance
٢٣
Among the believers are men true to what they promised Allāh. Among them is he who has fulfilled his vow , and among them is he who awaits . And they did not alter by any alteration -
٢٤
That Allāh may reward the truthful for their truth and punish the hypocrites if He wills or accept their repentance. Indeed, Allāh is ever Forgiving and Merciful
warasūluhu
وَرَسُولُهُۥ ۚ
and His Messenger
wamā
وَمَا
And not
zādahum
زَادَهُمْ
it increased them
illā
إِلَّآ
except
īmānan
إِيمَـٰنًۭا
faith
wataslīman
وَتَسْلِيمًۭا
and submission
 
۝٢٢
 
mina
مِّنَ
Among

ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

رِجَالٌۭ

liyajziya
لِّيَجْزِىَ

عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ

inna
إِنَّ
Indeed

ٱللَّهَ
Allah
kāna
كَانَ
is
ghafūran
غَفُورًۭا
Oft-Forgiving
raḥīman
رَّحِيمًۭا
Most Merciful
 
۝٢٤
 
waradda
وَرَدَّ
And Allah turned back
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
And Allah turned back
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
kafarū
كَفَرُوا۟
disbelieved

بِغَيْظِهِمْ
in their rage
lam
لَمْ
not
yanālū
يَنَالُوا۟
they obtained
khayran
خَيْرًۭا ۚ
any good
wakafā
وَكَفَى
And sufficient is
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
Allah
l-mu'minīna
ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
the believers
l-qitāla
ٱلْقِتَالَ ۚ
the battle
wakāna
وَكَانَ
and Allah is
l-lahu
ٱللَّهُ
and Allah is
AL-AHZABPage 51 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 52
٢٥
And Allāh repelled those who disbelieved, in their rage, not having obtained any good. And sufficient was Allāh for the believers in battle, and ever is Allāh Powerful and Exalted in Might
٢٦
And He brought down those who supported them among the People of the Scripture from their fortresses and cast terror into their hearts a party you killed, and you took captive a party
٢٧
And He caused you to inherit their land and their homes and their properties and a land which you have not trodden. And ever is Allāh, over all things, competent
٢٨
O Prophet, say to your wives, "If you should desire the
qawiyyan
قَوِيًّا
All-Strong
ʿazīzan
عَزِيزًۭا
All-Mighty
 
۝٢٥
 
wa-anzala
وَأَنزَلَ
And He brought down
alladhīna
ٱلَّذِينَ
those who
ẓāharūhum
ظَـٰهَرُوهُم
backed them
min
مِّنْ
among
ahli
أَهْلِ
People
l-kitābi
ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ
the Scripture
min
مِن
from

صَيَاصِيهِمْ
their fortresses

and cast

فَرِيقًۭا
a group

تَقْتُلُونَ
you killed

وَتَأْسِرُونَ
and you took captive
farīqan
فَرِيقًۭا
a group
 
۝٢٦
 
wa-awrathakum
وَأَوْرَثَكُمْ
And He caused you to inherit
arḍahum
أَرْضَهُمْ
their land
wadiyārahum
وَدِيَـٰرَهُمْ
and their houses

وَأَمْوَٰلَهُمْ
and their properties

and a land

لَّمْ
not

you trodden

And Allah is

All-Powerful

۝٢٧
ع19
 
yāayyuhā
يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا
O Prophet
l-nabiyu
ٱلنَّبِىُّ
O Prophet
qul
قُل
Say
li-azwājika
لِّأَزْوَٰجِكَ
to your wives
in
إِن
If
kuntunna
كُنتُنَّ
you
turid'na
تُرِدْنَ
desire
l-ḥayata
ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ
the life

ٱلدُّنْيَا
the world
wazīnatahā
وَزِينَتَهَا
and its adornment
fataʿālayna
فَتَعَالَيْنَ
then come
umattiʿ'kunna
أُمَتِّعْكُنَّ
I will provide for you
wa-usarriḥ'kunna
وَأُسَرِّحْكُنَّ
and release you
sarāḥan
سَرَاحًۭا
a release
jamīlan
جَمِيلًۭا
good
 
۝٢٨
 
wa-in
وَإِن
But if
kuntunna
كُنتُنَّ
you
turid'na
تُرِدْنَ
desire
AL-AHZABPage 52 · Juz 21
JUZ 21✦ AL-AHZAB ✦PAGE 53
…
worldly life and its adornment, then come, I will provide for you and give you a gracious release
٢٩
But if you should desire Allāh and His Messenger and the home of the Hereafter - then indeed, Allāh has prepared for the doers of good among you a great reward."
٣٠
O wives of the Prophet, whoever of you should commit a clear immorality - for her the punishment would be doubled two fold, and ever is that, for Allāh, easy
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
warasūlahu
وَرَسُولَهُۥ
and His Messenger
wal-dāra
وَٱلدَّارَ
and the Home
l-ākhirata
ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
the Hereafter
fa-inna
فَإِنَّ
then indeed
l-laha
ٱللَّهَ
Allah
aʿadda
أَعَدَّ
has prepared
lil'muḥ'sināti
لِلْمُحْسِنَـٰتِ
for the good-doers
minkunna
مِنكُنَّ
among you
ajran
أَجْرًا
a reward
ʿaẓīman
عَظِيمًۭا
great
 
۝٢٩
 
yānisāa
يَـٰنِسَآءَ
O wives

ٱلنَّبِىِّ
the Prophet
man
مَن
Whoever
yati

commits

from you
bifāḥishatin
بِفَـٰحِشَةٍۢ

مُّبَيِّنَةٍۢ
clear

يُضَـٰعَفْ

lahā

for her

ٱلْعَذَابُ
the punishment
ḍiʿ'fayni
ضِعْفَيْنِ ۚ
two fold

وَكَانَ
And that is
dhālika

And that is

for

ٱللَّهِ
Allah

easy
